title: Exploring the Future of Ethereum with Lodestar Team | Protocol Pop-Ins - Devconnect Special Podcast
description:
In this conversation, the Loadstar team discusses their experiences and insights from Devconnect 2025, focusing on the importance of community engagement, the challenges of EIP processes, and preparations for the Fusaka upgrade. They emphasize the significance of privacy in Ethereum, the need for inclusivity in protocol development, and their aspirations for future upgrades and community involvement.
